results.title: A Phase 1 Study of Neoadjuvant Cabozantinib in Combination With Radiation Therapy for Sarcomas of the Extremities.
results.abstract: Cabozantinib demonstrates activity in multiple soft tissue sarcoma (STS) subtypes, but use with concurrent radiation therapy (RT) has been limited by concern for risk of fistula or perforation. This phase 1 trial evaluated the safety of concurrent cabozantinib and RT as neoadjuvant therapy in patients with extremity STS.
